title: Smoky Macaroni Bake
description: A comforting, smoky pasta bake that combines Italian flavors with a crispy top.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the breadcrumbs and cook until lightly toasted.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, breadcrumb mixture, smoky cheese, italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Stir in the milk and parmesan cheese until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with additional bread crumbs and parmesan cheese if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
